page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A versatile software package for read mapping and integrative analysis of genomic and epigenomic variation using massively parallel DNA sequencing
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A versatile software package for read mapping and integrative analysis
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Pash 3.0 performs sequence comparison and read mapping and can be employed as a module within diverse configurable analysis pipelines, including ChIP-seq and methylome mapping by whole-genome bisulfite sequencing
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Pash 3.0 performs sequence comparison and read mapping and can be employed as a module within diverse configurable analysis pipelines, including ChIP-seq and methylome mapping by whole-genome bisulfite sequencing
